source.name: dailyecho.co.uk
source.title: The legend of an extinct circada that could make a comeback

en.summary: An extinct cicada species may return to the wild.
en.why_irrelevant: It's a nature oddity, far from political or tech topics.

zh.summary: 一种已灭绝的蝉可能重返野外。
zh.why_irrelevant: 这是自然趣闻，远离政治或科技话题。

brief: U.S. news features Trump paying $5M to E. Jean Carroll, New York pausing AI datacenters, and ICE halting vehicle stops after shootings. A T. rex fossil sells for $50.1 million. Research highlights AI-assisted writing and visualization tools.
news_summary: Trump pays $5.6 million to E. Jean Carroll; New York becomes first state to pause AI datacenters; ICE suspends vehicle stops after two fatal shootings; T. rex fossil fetches $50.1 million.
papers_summary: Studies explore AI in creative writing, playful AI in emails, and a taxonomy of data narrative failures, alongside tools for cryptocurrency manipulation risk and graph sampling visualization.

en.brief: U.S. news features Trump paying $5M to E. Jean Carroll, New York pausing AI datacenters, and ICE halting vehicle stops after shootings. A T. rex fossil sells for $50.1 million. Research highlights AI-assisted writing and visualization tools.
en.news_summary: Trump pays $5.6 million to E. Jean Carroll; New York becomes first state to pause AI datacenters; ICE suspends vehicle stops after two fatal shootings; T. rex fossil fetches $50.1 million.
en.papers_summary: Studies explore AI in creative writing, playful AI in emails, and a taxonomy of data narrative failures, alongside tools for cryptocurrency manipulation risk and graph sampling visualization.

zh.brief: 今日重點：中國異見人士董廣平駕艇偷渡韓國，南海仲裁案十年爭議未息，英國改革黨發言人韋黛琴命案轉為反恐調查。論文方面聚焦AI輔助寫作與數據敘事中的偏差問題。
zh.news_summary: 中國異見人士董廣平冒險駕艇穿越黃海偷渡韓國；南海仲裁案十年後仍爭議不斷；英國改革黨發言人韋黛琴遇害案升級為反恐調查。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇論文探討AI在創意寫作、電子郵件互動及數據敘事中的應用與風險，包括協作遊戲促進寫作、氣候焦慮的短影音表達，以及數據敘事常見錯誤的分類。

todays_image.caption: Both the fossilized remains of ancient disasters and the Hillsborough amendment represent long-neglected truths that must be unearthed and confronted in the halls of power.
todays_image.title: Hall of Dinosaurs and Fossil Reptiles, Museum of Natural History
